name: Charles Tyler
abstract: Charles Lacy Tyler (July 20, 1941 – June 27, 1992) was an American jazz saxophonist. He focused on baritone & alto saxophone and also played clarinet.

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: I worked with him on an album called Eastern Man Alone. We also recorded an album for Sonet Records... Charles remained my student
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Smulyan
about_quotes.evidence: his brother would have Sun Ra, he’d have Albert Ayler and Charles Tyler, and all these complete Free music going on. So I was exposed to that when I was younger.
